title: Girl Shy

evidence.note: Published 1924; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

watch.label: Internet Archive — Girl Shy (1924), full film

editorial: Girl Shy is a 1924 American silent romantic comedy directed by Fred C. Newmeyer and Sam Taylor, produced by Hal Roach and starring Harold Lloyd as a bashful tailor's apprentice, building to an elaborate cross-city rescue chase that helped define Lloyd's thrill-comedy style. Distributed by Pathé Exchange. Published in 1924, the film print's US copyright term has expired, placing the photoplay in the public domain by term expiry. Later restorations may carry their own separate rights.
